channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Eternal Seraph: Backpacks
item.description: Yes. New backpacks again.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Tethys Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks for a personal private server.

item.title: Darce's Drifters Redone
item.description: Complete visual overhaul of the original Darce's Drifters.

item.title: Metal Leaf
item.description: Smith metal into leaf to cheaply apply metallic textures to a chiseled block.

item.title: Rope And Spear
item.description: Return your spears with ease! Use vanilla/modded spears! Configurable via json

item.title: Dense Ground Storage
item.description: Place down more items per block and on chiseled blocks

item.title: Astria Porta
item.description: Astria Porta brings SG-1's stargates to Vintage Story for you to explore the world

item.title: Fast Ground Placing
item.description: Increases the bulk stack quantity on a few base game resources.

item.title: Dyed Wood
item.description: Adds dyed planks, slabs, and stairs for every vanilla wood while preserving natural grain.

item.title: More animations
item.description: Better body and face animations

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Kiln Spreader
item.description: A mod to readd the chain-lighting of pit kilns like in Terrafirmacraft.

item.title: Body Fat by Tasshroom
item.description: Body Fat - Stuff your face and save up those calories for the long journey ahead

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: PrecisePickedUp
item.description: Allow right-click to pick up drops and projectile, display drop information and merge drops.

item.title: Custom Server Patch
item.description: A collection of tweaks for our private server.

item.title: Eyes Glow In The Dark
item.description: Players' eyes glow in the dark.

item.title: Fiddleheads
item.description: Fiddlehead Ferns - Harvest wild furled fronds and use them in meals as any other vegetable

item.title: WOO Fantasy Additions
item.description: A mod focused on bringing the lore of the Oldwood into Vintage Story.

item.title: Vampirism
item.description: Become a creature of the night, drink blood, see in the dark and never touch silver again

item.title: XV Shaders
item.description: Unique & configurable shaders

item.title: SlowTox
item.description: Makes alcohol useful and more realistic

item.title: Real Smoke
item.description: Physics-based smoke

item.title: Ritual Apotheosis
item.description: Build ancient rites from fragments. The world is your altar. Dig deep. Seek truth. Light the fires.

item.title: StirlingMotor
item.description: Adds a Stirling engine (coal energy)

item.title: Combat Impact Sounds
item.description: Combat Impact overhauls the default thud sound produced when hitting an enemy with a weapon.

item.title: Armor Durability X4
item.description: Increases all vanilla armor durability by x4 (configurable)

item.title: Flower Seeds
item.description: Use a knife to turn flowers into seeds!
